title: The Brave Little Fox
summary: Маленький добрый лисёнок помогает лесным зверям во все четыре времени года и понимает, что быть смелым — значит помогать другим.
character: A small fluffy orange fox cub with bright round eyes, a fluffy white-tipped tail, and a little green knitted scarf around its neck.
style: soft warm watercolor children's picture-book illustration, rounded friendly shapes, gentle seasonal colours

pages.en: There was a small fox in the big green forest. He was kind, but he was not very brave. His name was Fix.
pages.ru: В большом зелёном лесу жил маленький лисёнок. Он был добрый, но не очень смелый. Его звали Фикс.
pages.scene: A small fluffy orange fox cub with bright round eyes, a fluffy white-tipped tail, and a little green knitted scarf sits at the edge of a sunny spring forest, looking shy among soft green trees and flowers.

pages.en: One spring morning, Fix heard a small cry. A baby bird was lost on the cold ground. It could not fly home.
pages.ru: Одним весенним утром Фикс услышал тихий плач. Маленький птенец потерялся на холодной земле. Он не мог улететь домой.
pages.scene: The small orange fox with the white-tipped tail and green scarf looks down at a tiny baby bird sitting on the grass under blooming spring trees, soft morning light and pink blossoms around them.

pages.en: The tree was very tall, and Fix was afraid. But he climbed up slowly. He put the baby bird back in its warm nest.
pages.ru: Дерево было очень высокое, и Фикс боялся. Но он медленно полез вверх. Он вернул птенца в его тёплое гнездо.
pages.scene: The little orange fox with the green scarf and fluffy white-tipped tail carefully climbs a tall spring tree, holding a baby bird, with green leaves and a nest above him in warm sunlight.

pages.en: Summer came, and the forest was hot and dry. Fix met a young deer near the river. The deer was thirsty and tired.
pages.ru: Пришло лето, и в лесу стало жарко и сухо. У реки Фикс встретил молодого оленёнка. Оленёнок хотел пить и очень устал.
pages.scene: The small orange fox with the white-tipped tail and green scarf stands by a sunny summer river next to a tired young deer, golden light, tall grass and bright green leaves all around.

pages.en: The river was far away and deep. Fix was a little scared of the water. He found a small cup of leaves and brought water to the deer.
pages.ru: Река была далеко и глубокая. Фикс немного боялся воды. Он сделал маленькую чашку из листьев и принёс оленёнку воды.
pages.scene: The little orange fox with the green scarf and fluffy white-tipped tail carries water in a folded leaf cup to a happy young deer, beside a sparkling summer river under a warm blue sky.

pages.en: Autumn came, and the leaves turned red and gold. Fix saw a little rabbit shaking under a bush. The rabbit was very cold.
pages.ru: Наступила осень, и листья стали красными и золотыми. Фикс увидел маленького зайчика, который дрожал под кустом. Зайчику было очень холодно.
pages.scene: The small orange fox with the white-tipped tail stands among falling red and gold autumn leaves, looking at a shivering little rabbit hiding under a bush, soft warm light.

pages.en: Fix loved his green scarf very much. But the rabbit needed it more. He gave his warm scarf to the cold little rabbit.
pages.ru: Фикс очень любил свой зелёный шарф. Но зайчику он был нужнее. Он отдал свой тёплый шарф замёрзшему зайчику.
pages.scene: The little orange fox with the fluffy white-tipped tail gently wraps his green scarf around a small rabbit, surrounded by red and gold autumn leaves in gentle afternoon light.

pages.en: Then cold winter came with deep white snow. Fix found a family of mice. They were hungry and had no food.
pages.ru: Потом пришла холодная зима с глубоким белым снегом. Фикс нашёл семью мышек. Они были голодные, и у них не было еды.
pages.scene: The small orange fox with the white-tipped tail and green scarf stands in soft white snow near a tiny burrow where a family of little mice look up, gentle blue winter light and snowy pine trees.

pages.en: Fix knew about a tree full of nuts far away. The forest was dark, and he was very scared. But he walked through the deep snow to find food.
pages.ru: Фикс знал о дереве с орехами далеко в лесу. Лес был тёмным, и Фикс очень боялся. Но он пошёл через глубокий снег, чтобы найти еду.
pages.scene: The little orange fox with the green scarf and fluffy white-tipped tail walks bravely alone through deep snow in a quiet dark winter forest, with soft falling snowflakes and tall snowy trees.

pages.en: On the way back, the snow was too deep, and Fix got stuck. He was tired and cold. He called for help in the white winter night.
pages.ru: На обратном пути снег был слишком глубокий, и Фикс застрял. Он устал и замёрз. Он позвал на помощь в белую зимнюю ночь.
pages.scene: The small orange fox with the white-tipped tail and green scarf is stuck deep in the snow, carrying nuts, calling for help under a soft starry winter sky with gentle moonlight.

pages.en: Then his friends came! The bird, the deer, the rabbit, and the mice all helped him. Together they pulled Fix out of the deep snow.
pages.ru: И тут пришли его друзья! Птица, оленёнок, зайчик и мышки — все помогли ему. Вместе они вытащили Фикса из глубокого снега.
pages.scene: The little orange fox with the green scarf and fluffy white-tipped tail is helped by a bird, a deer, a rabbit, and mice all together in the snow, warm friendly faces under soft winter starlight.

pages.en: Now Fix understood. Being brave means helping others, even when you are scared. All the friends sat together, happy and warm.
pages.ru: Теперь Фикс понял. Быть смелым — значит помогать другим, даже когда тебе страшно. Все друзья сидели вместе, счастливые и в тепле.
pages.scene: The small orange fox with the white-tipped tail and green scarf sits happily with the bird, deer, rabbit, and mice around a cozy warm light in the snow, all smiling together as spring snow melts at the forest edge.
